title: Ontology Capability Declaration
description: Allows sellers to declare which ontologies and taxonomies they support, enabling buyers to discover semantic interoperability before issuing a brief. Designed for use in get_adcp_capabilities responses.

supported_taxonomies.description: Taxonomies this seller can resolve buyer terms against.

authority.description: Canonical URI of the taxonomy authority.

coverage.description: full=fully indexed, partial=subset, mapping_only=can resolve terms but may not have direct inventory.

alignment_methods.description: Alignment methods the seller supports, ordered by priority.

resolution_transparency.description: When true, seller includes semantic_alignment attestations in media buy responses.

ontology_uri.description: URI of the seller's published ontology.
